title: Comfort Professional Fresh Concentrated Fabric Softener - 4.8L (240 Washes) | Long-Lasting Freshness for Your Laundry | Fabric Softener | Detergent
features: Professional-Grade Softness: Experience luxurious softness and long-lasting freshness with Comfort Professional Fresh Fabric Softener
Concentrated Formula: This 4.8-liter bottle offers a concentrated formula, providing exceptional softness and fragrance in every wash
Delightful Fragrance: Enjoy the uplifting scent of Fresh Concentrated, leaving your clothes smelling fresh and clean for days
Gentle on Fabrics: Specially formulated to be gentle on fabrics, helping to maintain their softness, color, and shape.
Easy to Use: Simply add a small amount of fabric softener to your laundry during the rinse cycle for soft, static-free clothes

Description: Elevate your laundry experience with Comfort Professional Fresh Concentrated Fabric Softener. This professional-grade fabric softener offers an advanced formula designed to provide luxurious softness and long-lasting freshness to your clothes

The concentrated formula means you only need to use a small amount per wash, making this 4.8-liter bottle incredibly economical. Infused with the delightful scent of Blue Skies, this fabric softener leaves your laundry smelling fresh and inviting
